## Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Problem It Solves

Explain the problem, limitation, or user need this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred implementation or behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, references, or related links here.
